sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Boeing to Release Second Quarter Results on July 28 – Company Announcement
feed.summary: The Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, July 28. President and CEO Kelly Ortberg and CFO Jay Malave will discuss the results and company outlook during a conference call at 10:30 a.m. ET. The event webcast and materials will be accessible on Boeing's investor relations website.

feed.title: National Energy Services Reunited Could Report Strong Q2 on Jafurah Acceleration, UBS Says
feed.summary: UBS analysts predict National Energy Services Reunited (NESR) will report strong second-quarter earnings, exceeding consensus estimates. This positive outlook is primarily attributed to the acceleration of the Jafurah unconventional gas program in Saudi Arabia, where NESR has a significant operational presence as a primary contractor. The analysts also highlight NESR's strong balance sheet and robust backlog, suggesting potential for debt reduction and increased capital returns.

feed.title: National Grid Agrees to $1.75B Investment in Joulent to Expand AI Power Infrastructure
feed.summary: National Grid has announced a $1.75 billion strategic minority investment in Joulent, a power developer creating dedicated generation for hyperscale AI data centers. This investment aims to expedite power supply for AI infrastructure by supporting models that bypass traditional utility interconnection timelines, addressing the rapidly increasing electricity demands of AI. Joulent's "Across-the-Meter" approach focuses on building power generation facilities adjacent to customer sites, with Project Kilby in Texas being its inaugural endeavor to provide 2.67 GW to a Microsoft data center.

feed.title: Citigroup Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) Stock Price
feed.summary: Citigroup has cut its price target for Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) from $178 to $138, though it maintains a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 31% upside. Other analysts like Bank of America and Wells Fargo have also issued more conservative price targets. Despite the cautious outlook, Leidos recently reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings with $3.13 EPS on $4.40 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In AbbVie 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
feed.summary: Five years ago, a $1000 investment in AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) would now be worth $2,154.41, demonstrating an average annual return of 16.59%. This performance surpasses the market by 5.03% on an annualized basis. The article highlights the significant impact of compounded returns on investment growth over time.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems stock holds steady. Focus turns to its core software business.
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) stock is holding steady, with investor focus on its recurring software revenue model and its role in US electronics design workflows. The company is a key player in electronic design automation (EDA), providing software for semiconductor and system design. Cadence's performance is tied to chip design activity, software demand, and broader US tech sentiment, especially with the increasing influence of AI in chip development.

feed.title: Jacobs Lands Orange County Highway Modernization Contracts
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions Inc. has secured contracts with the Orange County Transportation Authority for significant highway modernization projects in Orange County, California. These projects aim to ease traffic congestion and improve travel reliability on State Route 91 and Interstate 5, two of the region's busiest corridors. The contract wins further bolster Jacobs' substantial backlog and growth outlook, even as its stock performance has lagged the industry year-to-date.

feed.title: Marcus & Millichap publishes New York City Multifamily 2Q 2026 Market Report
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap has released its New York City Multifamily 2Q 2026 Market Report, highlighting the city's resilience as a multifamily market with improving transaction activity and pricing clarity. Key findings indicate New York City is on track for its lowest annual apartment delivery volume in a decade, bolstering tenant retention and contributing to strong rents despite moderating population trends. Investors are favoring newer market-rate assets, with stable pricing and higher cap rates enhancing transparency in the market.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices Inc Stock (AMD) Moved Down by 5.73% on Jul 1: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc (AMD) stock fell by 5.73% on July 1, driven by institutional profit-taking after significant gains, pressures from its premium valuation, and concerns over rising component costs for its Radeon GPUs. Despite this setback, the article suggests the long-term AI thesis for AMD remains robust, viewing the decline as a standard valuation reset. The company faces risks from extreme valuation and execution, weakness in consumer markets, and unproven next-gen product ramps.

feed.title: Form 144 MOODYS CORP /DE/ For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: Investing.com reports on a Form 144 filing for Moody's Corp (MCO) on July 1st. The article provides this basic information alongside various market data, including indices, commodities, and cryptocurrency prices. It also features trending articles and stock performance metrics.

feed.title: Micron Drops 8%, SanDisk Slumps 10%, Western Digital Falls 7% as Memory Stocks Pull Back With the NASDAQ
feed.summary: Shares of memory companies like Micron Technology, SanDisk, and Western Digital experienced significant drops, alongside a broader semiconductor pullback led by the NASDAQ. This downturn follows massive year-to-date rallies and is influenced by institutional rebalancing, hawkish Federal Reserve statements, and a class-action lawsuit alleging price fixing in the DRAM market. Despite the pullback, Micron's recent blowout fiscal Q3 results and positive long-term supercycle outlook suggest underlying strength.

feed.title: Winners And Losers Of Q1: Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) Vs The Rest Of The Waste Management Stocks
feed.summary: This article analyzes the Q1 earnings performance of Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) and other waste management stocks. It highlights that while Republic Services met expectations, other companies like Onterris (NYSE:ONT) and Perma-Fix (NASDAQ:PESI) had mixed results. The piece also discusses broader market trends, including shifts from AI and crypto anxieties to geopolitical risks, and touches on the predictable yet regulated nature of the waste management industry.

feed.title: Marcus & Millichap Arranges $3.8 Million Sale of Shopping Center in Suburban Richmond, Virginia
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap has facilitated the sale of Stonewall Square, a 15,922-square-foot shopping center in Mechanicsville, Virginia, for $3.8 million. The property, built in 2008 and situated on two acres, was fully leased at the time of sale with tenants including Firehouse Subs, Benchmark Physical Therapy, and a Thai restaurant. Chase Hensen, Dean Zang, and David Crotts of Marcus & Millichap represented the seller in the transaction.

feed.title: Walmart Inc Stock (WMT) Moved Down by 4.98% on Jul 1: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. (WMT) stock declined by 4.98% on July 1st, driven by a report from Cleveland Research indicating a slowdown in U.S. comparable store sales and raising concerns about its valuation. Technical indicators like MACD signal a sell, and broader anxiety regarding macroeconomic consumer spending pressures is impacting investor sentiment. The company is actively reducing inventory and leveraging tariff refunds, but the market remains focused on slowing core retail volumes and economic headwinds.

feed.title: Stryker Vs. Intuitive Surgical: Stryker’s Joint-Replacement Moat Over Intuitive’s Premium Valuation
feed.summary: This article analyzes the Q1 2026 performance of Stryker (SYK) and Intuitive Surgical (ISRG), highlighting their contrasting results. Stryker faced challenges from a cyberattack and restructuring, though its Mako-driven ortho and Inari-boosted vascular segments showed resilience. Intuitive Surgical, while achieving strong revenue growth and EPS, saw its da Vinci procedure growth guidance step down, and its valuation remains significantly higher than Stryker's. The author leans towards Stryker due to its durable exposure and structural compounder profile, despite its recent stock decline.

feed.title: Nike Earnings: Transformation Progress Overshadowed by Near-Term Challenges
feed.summary: Morningstar anticipates a slight reduction in its fair value estimate for Nike shares due to a soft near-term outlook, despite progress in CEO Elliott Hill's "Win Now" plan. The company's sales fell 1% in Q4 fiscal 2026, largely due to a decline in Greater China, though North America saw a modest rise. While management expects subpar sales through calendar 2026, Morningstar believes performance will improve in calendar 2027 with new product releases and better margins, maintaining its wide moat rating on Nike's brand advantages.

feed.title: Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU): Is More Upside Already Priced In?
feed.summary: This article discusses Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) and whether its recent share momentum has already priced in further upside. It highlights that the company provides insurance, retirement products, annuities, workplace benefits, and asset management services, and that current market attention is focused on its valuation, earnings quality, capital discipline, and insurance-sector risks. The full content of the article is behind a login/registration wall, preventing access to further details.

feed.title: Can Costco Outgrow Retail Headwinds on Balance Sheet Strength?
feed.summary: Costco's strong balance sheet, with nearly $20 billion in liquid assets and a conservative capital structure, positions it well to navigate retail headwinds. The company's membership model provides a predictable revenue stream, supporting continued investment in expansion and digital capabilities. Despite higher valuation metrics compared to competitors, Costco shows robust growth estimates for both current and next fiscal years.

feed.title: Why Is MRAM Stock Surging Premarket Today?
feed.summary: Everspin Technologies (MRAM) stock surged over 11% in premarket trading due to continued investor optimism concerning a recently expanded $40 million defense deal. This deal involves providing Toggle Magnetoresistive RAM (MRAM) technology to the U.S. Defense Industrial Base over two and a half years. Retail sentiment on Stocktwits was "extremely bullish," with some users predicting significant further upside for the stock.

feed.title: PPL Corporation outlines its steady utility strategy as investors watch regulated returns
feed.summary: PPL Corporation, a major regulated utility holding company, continues to emphasize its steady utility strategy through regulated earnings and infrastructure investment. The company's business model focuses on predictable cash flows, long-term capital programs, and dividend sustainability, appealing to income-oriented investors. PPL's strategy adapts to the energy transition and regulatory trends while balancing reliable service with customer affordability and investor returns.

feed.title: MLTX (Nasdaq) Rule 144 notice shows 150,000 Class A shares sale (04/10/2026)
feed.summary: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX) has filed a Rule 144 notice indicating a proposed resale of 150,000 Class A Ordinary shares. The filing specifies a contemporaneous sale of these shares by Jorge Santos da Silva on April 10, 2026, for $2,787,000.00. The shares are listed on Nasdaq, and the filing also references an earlier exchange date of April 5, 2023.

feed.title: Form 144 Newegg Commerce For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com announces the Form 144 filing for Newegg Commerce on July 1st. It also includes various market data and other news headlines related to finance and cryptocurrency. The core content is the brief announcement regarding Newegg's Form 144.

feed.title: Form 144 MAIN STREET CAPITAL CORP For: 30 June By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 144 for MAIN STREET CAPITAL CORP for the period ending June 30. It provides this information without additional details, but includes market data and links to other financial news.

feed.title: Monster Energy Java Monster Triple Shot French Vanilla - Monster Beverage Corp. pushes high-caffeine
feed.summary: Monster Beverage Corp. has launched its new Monster Energy Java Monster Triple Shot French Vanilla, a high-caffeine coffee-energy blend containing 300 mg of caffeine per 15 fl oz can. This product targets the coffee-loving US consumer segment, strengthening Monster's portfolio beyond traditional energy drinks and competing with ready-to-drink coffee brands like Starbucks. Its strategic placement in convenience stores and supermarkets aims to appeal to commuters, students, and shift workers seeking a significant caffeine boost in a familiar French vanilla coffee flavor.

feed.title: General Motors (GM) Stock Climbs on Micron Memory Chip Partnership
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) shares increased after announcing a strategic partnership with Micron Technology, ensuring GM's access to critical LPDRAM, NOR, and UFS NAND memory components. This collaboration aims to provide a reliable supply chain for essential chip components and jointly develop future memory solutions for next-generation vehicles. The partnership leverages Micron's $2 billion investment in a Manassas, Virginia DRAM production facility, strengthening both companies' market positions.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Nova (NVMI) Could Change Following Surging Margins And Revenue Growth Metrics – Learn Why
feed.summary: Nova (NVMI) has reported strong quarterly results with a 25.3% compounded annual revenue growth rate and a 28.8% operating margin, outperforming many semiconductor peers. This performance, along with Q1 2026 revenue of US$235.31 million and net income of US$69.26 million, solidifies Nova's position as an efficient operator. However, the investment narrative is sensitive to potential slowdowns in customer CapEx or advanced node spending, despite analysts projecting growth to $1.5 billion revenue and $490.5 million earnings by 2029, suggesting a fair value of $597.62.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Price Forecast: 50% Gross Margin Record Fails to Stop Triangle Breakdown
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) is experiencing a sharp disconnect between its strong fundamental performance and a bearish technical setup. Despite achieving a record 50.5% non-GAAP gross margin in Q3 FY2026 and significant revenue growth due to massive cloud demand and multi-year hyperscale agreements, the stock has broken below a symmetrical triangle formation. Technical analysis suggests a potential decline towards $584–$542, while investors await to see if key support levels hold or if the technical breakdown persists despite the company's robust financial health and shift to a net cash position.

feed.title: BlackRock lifts Caledonia Mining stake above 6% threshold
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has increased its total voting interest in Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc to 6.12%, reaching 1,184,010 voting rights. This significant shareholder change was reported on June 29, 2026, following a threshold crossing on June 26, 2026. The holding includes direct share voting rights, securities lending, and CFDs, signaling a notable shift in institutional ownership for Caledonia Mining.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp outlines its regional banking role as investors watch credit trends
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is positioning itself as a major regional U.S. bank, with its earnings profile significantly influenced by interest rate movements and credit quality. The bank offers a diversified franchise including retail, commercial, and wealth management services, relying on deposits for funding its loan book. Investors closely monitor loan growth, deposit mix, and credit quality trends, as well as the bank's ability to balance growth with prudent underwriting across its portfolios.

feed.title: Pinnacle West Capital focuses on regulated utility growth as investors watch the power demand cycle
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital, a US-based utility holding company, is gaining investor interest due to its reliance on regulated earnings, population growth in Arizona, and investments in grid infrastructure. The company's primary operating subsidiary, Arizona Public Service, serves a rapidly expanding Sun Belt region, supporting long-term electricity demand. Pinnacle West is also engaging in the broader energy transition by investing in transmission, distribution, and generation while managing the shift towards lower-carbon resources.

feed.title: Form 144 GENERAC HOLDINGS INC. For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article is a brief announcement regarding a Form 144 filing for GENERAC HOLDINGS INC. on July 1st. It provides no further details about the filing's content. The article is published by Investing.com, a financial markets news source.

feed.title: Bank of NT Butterfield stock hits all-time high at 60.42 USD
feed.summary: Bank of NT Butterfield & Son Ltd (NTB) stock reached an all-time high of $60.42 USD, reflecting a 30.82% increase over the past year. This performance is supported by strong investor confidence, a P/E ratio of 10.4, and a 3.36% dividend yield. The article also mentions Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce's recent earnings beat and sale of Caribbean operations as other significant financial news.

feed.title: Insider Unloading: Eric A Fisher Sells $2.01M Worth Of Valero Energy Shares
feed.summary: Eric A Fisher, SVP at Valero Energy, sold 7,500 shares of the company worth $2.01 million on June 30, according to a recent SEC filing. Valero Energy, a major independent refiner, shows positive revenue growth and prudent debt management, though its stock currently trades at a higher-than-average P/E ratio. Insider transactions provide valuable insight but should be part of a broader investment analysis.

feed.title: Boeing sets July 28 results call with CEO, CFO at 10:30 a.m.
feed.summary: The Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, July 28. President and CEO Kelly Ortberg and EVP and CFO Jay Malave will discuss the results and company outlook during a conference call at 10:30 a.m. ET, which will be accessible via webcast on Boeing’s investor website. This announcement aligns with Boeing's routine pre-earnings disclosures, with past similar notices showing an average stock move of about 2.22%.

feed.title: 124 New Permanent Supportive Homes for Veterans Made Possible in Part by The Home Depot Foundation
feed.summary: Swords to Plowshares announced a $750,000 grant from The Home Depot Foundation to create 124 permanent supportive homes for veterans in San Francisco. The project involves rehabilitating 1035 Van Ness Avenue into a service-enriched housing community with comprehensive support services. This initiative, valued at $44 million, aims to address homelessness among older veterans in California and provides them with stability, dignity, and access to essential care.

feed.title: FDA Authorizes Lower Disease Risk Claim for Select Philip Morris Zyn Nicotine Pouches
feed.summary: The FDA has authorized Philip Morris International's ZYN nicotine pouches to carry a lower disease risk claim, meaning they can now be marketed as reducing the risk of numerous smoking-related diseases when used as a complete substitute for cigarettes. This decision applies to 20 specific ZYN products and requires ongoing monitoring to assess consumer behavior and public health impact. While seen as a significant step for consumers, the FDA reiterates that no tobacco product is safe and non-users should not start.

feed.title: BlackRock to Report Second Quarter 2026 Earnings on July 15th
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) announced it will report its second-quarter 2026 earnings before the New York Stock Exchange opens on Wednesday, July 15, 2026. A teleconference call for investors and analysts will be hosted by Chairman and CEO Laurence D. Fink and other executives at 7:30 a.m. ET, with an accompanying webcast available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: Boeing to Release Second Quarter Results on July 28
feed.summary: The Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, July 28. President and CEO Kelly Ortberg and CFO Jay Malave will discuss the results and company outlook during a conference call at 10:30 a.m. ET. The webcast, news release, and presentation materials will be available on Boeing's investor relations website.

feed.title: Tesla’s Vehicle Deliveries Rise 3% as Car Sales Growth Slows Globally
feed.summary: Tesla's vehicle deliveries increased by approximately 3% in the last three months compared to the same period last year, reaching an estimated 396,466 units. This growth is significantly lower than the company's peak quarters and reflects a slowing global car sales market, even as investors anticipate progress on Elon Musk's AI ambitions.

feed.title: Revvity Expands Signals AI Ecosystem Through Anthropic Claude Integration
feed.summary: Revvity Signals Software has joined Anthropic's directory for Model Context Protocol (MCP) connectors, allowing scientists to access Signals AI alongside their R&D knowledge through Claude. This integration enables Claude to securely access scientific data via Signals' intelligence layer, improving context-aware analysis. The collaboration aims to accelerate scientific research by combining Anthropic's AI capabilities with Revvity Signals' trusted scientific workflows and governed data.

feed.title: Alliant Energy steady on regulated utility profile and Midwest focus
feed.summary: Alliant Energy Corp. is a regulated utility operating in the U.S. Midwest, focusing on stable service, predictable dividends, and infrastructure investment. The company emphasizes renewable energy projects and grid modernization while aiming to reduce reliance on fossil fuels. Alliant Energy's strategy balances customer affordability, reliability, and environmental goals within the broader U.S. utility sector.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies stock follows its core municipal software business
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) remains a public-sector software company, with its stock performance anchored to its core municipal software business. The company provides software and services to public agencies for managing various administrative tasks, relying on a recurring revenue model from subscriptions and services. Its market story emphasizes operating model execution, contract renewals, and public-sector digitization, rather than single headline events.

feed.title: What Are Colgate-Palmolive’s Sustainability Plans For 2030?
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive has released its 2025 Sustainability & Social Impact Report, detailing achievements and outlining ambitious 2030 targets. The company aims to build on its previous successes in social impact, consumer health, and environmental preservation. Key goals include reaching 2.7 billion children with oral health education, achieving net-zero carbon emissions by 2040, and implementing deforestation-free sourcing for packaging.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. outlines its asset management reach across funds and ETFs
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. operates as a global independent investment management firm offering a broad range of mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs) to both retail and institutional clients. The company's business model relies on scale, distribution reach, and a diversified product shelf, generating revenue primarily from investment management fees tied to assets under management. Invesco's offerings span various asset classes, including equities, fixed income, multi-asset, and alternatives, with a significant emphasis on ETFs for transparent and tradable access to specific indexes, factors, or themes.

feed.title: BKR (NASDAQ) Form 144: 72,000 Class A shares, $3.96M via Fidelity
feed.summary: Baker Hughes Co (BKR) filed a Form 144 notice for the proposed sale of 72,000 Class A shares, valued at approximately $3.96 million, through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on NASDAQ. The intended sale date is July 1, 2026. The filing details multiple restricted stock vesting entries from 2022 to 2024, accounting for the shares to be sold.

feed.title: Form 4 T. Rowe Price Group Inc For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com announces the filing of Form 4 for T. Rowe Price Group Inc., dated July 1st. It also includes general market data, popular news headlines, and various financial instrument prices, but provides no further details regarding the Form 4 filing itself. The content primarily serves as a placeholder or brief alert about the regulatory filing.

feed.title: CDW Corp. holds the line as traders wait for a fresh catalyst.
feed.summary: CDW Corp. (ISIN US1258961002) continues to primarily be influenced by enterprise IT spending and distribution demand. Investors are focusing on the company's upcoming earnings report and new analyst commentary to find fresh catalysts. The company's business model revolves around product resale, configuration, and services for commercial and public-sector clients, with its shares closely mirroring IT refresh cycles and spending patterns.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare (HCA) Reports Promising Gene-Editing Therapy Study Results
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (HCA) has announced promising results from a gene-editing therapy study published in The New England Journal of Medicine. The study evaluated exa-cel for children aged 5-11 with severe sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia, showing all participants achieved significant positive outcomes. Despite these clinical advancements, TD Cowen analyst Ryan Langston lowered HCA's price target due to flat year-over-year revenue, and the company also announced a key executive transition.

feed.title: Devon Energy (DVN): The Most Undervalued American Stock to Invest In
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is highlighted as one of the most undervalued American stocks. Recent analyst ratings include Morgan Stanley lowering its price target to $63 but maintaining an Overweight rating, and Goldman Sachs reinstating coverage with a Buy rating and a $54 price target, citing the company's focus on its Delaware Basin asset and strong cash flow yield. Raymond James also maintained a Strong Buy rating while adjusting its price target to $66, awaiting portfolio rationalization as a catalyst.

feed.title: Marcus Theatres Records Highest June Revenue of All Time
feed.summary: Marcus Theatres, the fourth-largest theatre circuit in the U.S., announced its highest total revenue for June in company history, driven by the strong performance of "Toy Story 5" and other films. The record-breaking results include admissions, concessions, merchandise, and food and beverage revenue. The company also highlighted significant moviegoer attendance, with over 90 million people estimated to have attended movies in June.
